sections.content:
This document describes the deployment architecture for IMS core components including P-CSCF,
I-CSCF, S-CSCF, and HSS.

P-CSCF requires DNS and HSS connectivity. SIP interface must be enabled. Diameter connectivity
uses port

S-CSCF communicates with HSS using Diameter. Redundancy and HA clustering are mandatory in
production environments.

Diameter interfaces require routing rules, failover handling, and heartbeat timers. TCP and SCTP are
supported.

ENUM lookup services must be configured before SIP routing activation. DNS failover should support
geo-redundancy.
